---
title: "CV"
---

## Yu Zhou

**Affiliation:** Fuzhou University  
**Location:** Fuzhou, China  
**GitHub:** <https://github.com/ZhouYuFZU>

## Education

- Add degree, department, university, years

## Research Experience

- Add research group, role, project, years

## Publications

See [Publications](publications.qmd).

## Skills

- Experimental data analysis
- Scientific programming
- Data visualization
- Academic writing

## Download

If you have a PDF version of your CV, place it in this repository as `CV.pdf`, then change this line to:

```markdown
[Download CV](CV.pdf)
```
